title: CBDT Brings Relief: Condonation of Delay for Form 10AB Filing for 80G Approval Renewal
content:
# CBDT Brings Relief: Condonation of Delay for Form 10AB Filing for 80G Approval Renewal

Ek important update hai! Government ne charitable funds and institutions ko relief dete hue, Form 10AB ki filing mein hui delay ko condone karne ka announcement kiya hai. Yeh un entities ke liye hai jo Income-tax Act, 1961 ke Section 80G(5) ke तहत approval renew karwa rahe the.

**Key Highlights:**

*   **Circular Number & Date:** CBDT ne Circular No. 06/2026-Income Tax dated July 02, 2026, issue kiya hai.
*   **What Happened:** Many institutions whose 80G approval was expiring on March 31, 2026, could not file Form 10AB by the prescribed due date of September 30, 2025, due to genuine hardship.
*   **Condonation Details:** The delay has been condoned for Form No. 10AB applications filed electronically between October 01, 2025, and March 31, 2026.
*   **Impact on Rejected Applications:** Jin applications ko pehle sirf delay ke reason se reject kar diya gaya tha, unhe ab condoned mana jayega aur merits par reconsider kiya jayega.
*   **Deadline for Disposal:** Jurisdictional Principal Commissioners ya Commissioners of Income-tax ko aise applications ko December 31, 2026, tak merits par dispose karna hoga.
*   **Important Note:** Is condonation se automatic 80G approval nahi milega; applications ka evaluation merits par hi hoga.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://irsofficersonline.gov.in/)

*Published on: 4 July 2026*
